'''zasaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zamandoque|zamandoque]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-s-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zamandoque|zamandoque]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zasaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæsæbæth|zæsæbæth]] || [[word:zæsæbæj|zæsæbæj]] || [[word:zæsæbæsh|zæsæbæsh]] || [[word:zæsæbæ|zæsæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zasasabath|zasasabath]] || [[word:zasasabaj|zasasabaj]] || [[word:zasasabash|zasasabash]] || [[word:zasasaba|zasasaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zasabath|zasabath]] || [[word:zasabaj|zasabaj]] || [[word:zasabash|zasabash]] || [[word:zasaba|zasaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zasafbath|zasafbath]] || [[word:zasafbaj|zasafbaj]] || [[word:zasafbash|zasafbash]] || [[word:zasafbaf|zasafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zasabatha|zasabatha]] || [[word:zasabaja|zasabaja]] || [[word:zasabasha|zasabasha]] || [[word:zasabaka|zasabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zasabath|zasabath]] || [[word:zasabaj|zasabaj]] || [[word:zasabash|zasabash]] || [[word:zasaba|zasaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zasabathal|zasabathal]] || [[word:zasabajal|zasabajal]] || [[word:zasabashal|zasabashal]] || [[word:zasabakal|zasabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zasabathatha|zasabathatha]] || [[word:zasabajaja|zasabajaja]] || [[word:zasabashasha|zasabashasha]] || [[word:zasabaka|zasabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zasabathan|zasabathan]] || [[word:zasabajan|zasabajan]] || [[word:zasabashan|zasabashan]] || [[word:zasabakan|zasabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zasabathaoro|zasabathaoro]] || [[word:zasabajaoro|zasabajaoro]] || [[word:zasabashaoro|zasabashaoro]] || [[word:zasabakaoro|zasabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
